meta.title: Tavli pricing — €30 or €60/month
meta.description: Two tiers, monthly or annual. No per-cover fees, no setup fees. The first three months free for every new restaurant.
meta.ogDescription: A complete reservation system from €30/month. Three months free, set up personally by the founder before you pay.

hero.title: Two tiers.
hero.subtitle: Tavli is a reservation platform built like the restaurants that use it — in service of the diner, in service of the room, in service of the people running it. Two subscriptions, monthly or annual. No per-cover fees. No setup fees. No contract you can't walk away from.
hero.trialNote: The first three months free for every new restaurant.

frequency.label: Billing
frequency.annualTooltip: Annual prepay costs the same as 10 months — you get 2 months free versus monthly billing.

base.name: Tavli
base.tagline: A complete reservation system for one independent restaurant.
bullets: Unlimited reservations. Never a per-cover fee.
A booking widget that drops into your site in two lines of code — and looks like your brand, not ours.
Automated confirmations and 24-hour reminders in Romanian, English, and German.
Self-serve modify and cancel links — fewer phone calls to your host stand.
A trilingual venue page (RO / EN / DE), up to 20 photos and 2 menus.
Reviews only from diners with a checked-in reservation. No fake reviews, no anonymous trolling.
12 months of booking history, exportable to CSV any time, plus a weekly summary email.
Google Maps and Google Business sync — local SEO out of the box.
base.note: Single location. Up to 5 staff accounts.

pro.name: Tavli Pro
pro.tagline: Everything in Tavli, plus the corporate-events channel and a marketing suite.
bullets: The corporate and private-events channel — qualified inquiries routed to you, matched on cuisine, capacity, and price point.
Private-rooms and buyout module: multi-room availability, a custom event-request flow, deposits at booking.
The marketing suite: email, SMS, and WhatsApp Business, with six set-and-forget automated campaigns.
Segmentation across six dimensions, capped at 4 messages/diner/month — no diner spammed, no surprise bill.
Cross-venue customer database and per-campaign booking attribution.
No-show heat map, cohort retention, lead-time distribution, and a 4-week rolling cover forecast.
Unlimited photos and menus, a video hero on the venue page, and full CSS control of the widget.
First right to be featured in Tavli's editorial guides, plus rights to use our photography of your venue.
pro.note: Up to 3 locations included. Additional locations €15/month each.

decisionHelp.heading: Not sure?
decisionHelp.body: Choose Tavli if you're one venue without a corporate-events motion. Choose Tavli Pro if you do private events, want marketing campaigns, or run multiple venues.

vat.heading: All prices shown in EUR
vat.intro: The final amount payable depends on your tax status:

types.label: Business customers in Romania
types.body: Reverse-charged VAT (you remit; the price shown is exactly what you pay).

types.label: Business customers in the EU (outside Romania)
types.body: Reverse-charged VAT with a valid VAT ID checked via VIES; otherwise +19%.

vat.footer: We'll confirm your tax status at signup. Stripe Tax computes and collects correctly for your locale.

cardOnFile.title: Try Tavli free for 90 days.
cardOnFile.body: We save a card at signup for friction-free conversion at day 91.
cardOnFile.cancelText: Cancel anytime — we email reminders at day 60, 75, and 85 before the first charge.

yearOne.heading: Year one, plainly
yearOne.intro: No asterisks. Here's exactly what you pay in your first year, on each plan.

rows.plan: Tavli Pro with 5 locations, monthly billing
Tavli Pro with 5 locations, annual prepay

yearOne.footnote: All prices in EUR. VAT treatment depends on your customer type — see the panel above. The RON equivalent is shown at the day's BNR reference rate.

promises.heading: The promises we make
promises.intro: These aren't marketing lines. They're contract terms. We will not strike any of them out.

items.label: No per-cover fees, ever.
items.body: If we ever change that pricing model in the future, your current contract grandfathers you out forever.

items.label: You own your data.
items.body: Cancel any time and we hand you a full CSV export of every diner, every booking, every review, every campaign. No data hostage situation.

items.label: Annual prepay is refundable pro-rata.
items.body: If you prepay annually and decide at month 4 it isn't working, we refund the unused months. No questions.

items.label: No annual lock-in unless you choose it.
items.body: Monthly billing is the default. Annual prepay is for the 2-months-free discount, not for keeping you stuck.

items.label: Cancellation is one click in the product.
items.body: No support ticket, no retention call, no "we'll process this in 7-10 business days."

items.label: One free trial per legal entity.
items.body: Card on file at signup. Billing starts day 91. No surprise charges before then.

setup.heading: What we do for you in your first three months free
setup.intro: The founder personally invests time in your launch before you ever pay us a euro.

steps.title: White-glove migration
steps.body: We move your reservations, your diner list, and your settings out of whatever you're using now and into Tavli. In one sitting.

steps.title: Page-and-photos session
steps.body: The founder visits your restaurant, photographs your dishes and dining room with proper equipment, and writes your trilingual venue page on the spot. You approve before publish.

steps.title: Staff training
steps.body: Your hosts and managers walk through the partner portal with us until they're comfortable.

steps.title: Parallel run
steps.body: Keep your old system live alongside Tavli for the first month. Switch over when you're ready, not when we tell you to.

steps.title: First three campaigns set up live
steps.body: We sit down with you and design your welcome series, your first lapsed-diner reactivation, and your first themed campaign — together, on your data.

setup.quote: Three months free isn't a free trial. It's a setup window. The founder personally invests time in your launch before you ever pay us a euro.

enterprise.heading: Running five or more locations?
enterprise.body: The two public tiers are for independent restaurants and small groups (1–3 locations). If you're running five or more, or you're a chain with a shared back-office, write to us and we'll design something that fits. We don't do inflated "Enterprise" pricing. We do "tell us what you actually need" pricing.

items.label: When does my card get charged?
items.body: Day 91 of your trial. We send reminders at day 60, 75, and 85; cancel any time during the trial and the card is never charged.

items.label: Is the card charged during the trial?
items.body: No. We save the card at signup, but the first charge is only on day 91. Until then you owe us nothing.

items.label: What happens if I cancel?
items.body: Cancellation is one click in the product — no ticket, no retention call. We hand you a full CSV export of all your data.

items.label: Can I switch between monthly and annual?
items.body: Yes, any time. Annual prepay gives you 2 months free. If you prepay annually and change your mind, we refund the unused months pro-rata.

items.label: How does VAT work?
items.body: Prices shown are in EUR, ex-VAT. VAT treatment depends on your customer type — see the VAT panel above. Stripe Tax computes and collects correctly.

items.label: What if I run more than one location?
items.body: Tavli Pro includes up to 3 locations. Each additional location is €15/month. For five or more, write to hello@tavli.ro.

items.label: What's the difference between Tavli and Tavli Pro?
items.body: Tavli if you're one venue without a corporate-events motion. Tavli Pro if you do private events, want marketing campaigns, or run multiple venues.

ron.footnote: RON shown at today's BNR reference rate, 1 EUR ≈ {rate} RON (as of {date}). We bill in EUR.
ron.staleOneDay: This rate is from yesterday — BNR hasn't published a newer one yet.
ron.staleWarn: This rate is no longer current — BNR hasn't published recent updates.

waitlist.modalBody: Tavli launches city by city. Leave your email and we'll let you know the moment we open signups in your area.
waitlist.success: You're on the list. We'll write the moment we open in your area.
waitlist.errorDuplicate: This email is already on the list. We'll be in touch soon.
waitlist.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
waitlist.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
